message:
fix(fp-frame): correct filter/loc_slice alignment and handle empty Series/DataFrame

Series.filter() and DataFrame.filter_rows():
- Switch from align_union to align(..., AlignMode::Left) so extra mask
  labels are silently ignored, matching pandas behavior

Series.loc_slice() and DataFrame.loc_slice():
- Add early return for empty index preventing index-out-of-bounds panic

Tests:
- Add series_loc_slice_empty_returns_empty test
- Add series_filter_ignores_extra_mask_labels test

Update compatibility attestation artifacts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
